category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/theseus-rs/rsql describes a command line SQL interface for databases and data files.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI for relational databases and common data file formats.
display_name_sources: Official repository title is theseus-rs/rsql at https://github.com/theseus-rs/rsql.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation is linked from the rsql project and contains CLI usage docs.
Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/theseus-rs/rsql, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
